title: IntelliHybrid: Intelligent On-Premise to AWS Cloud Connector
description: IntelliHybrid is a production-ready, configuration-driven framework that enables secure, seamless bidirectional communication between on-premise infrastructure and AWS cloud environments. It automatically provisions DynamoDB tables with configurable Partition Key (PK) and Sort Key (SK) definitions, establishes encrypted VPN tunnels, connects on-premise databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server), and performs continuous bidirectional data synchronization — all driven by a single YAML configuration file.
notes: This software was developed to address the challenge of securely integrating on-premise databases with AWS cloud services. It provides a configuration-driven approach that eliminates the need for custom integration code.
